name: LicenseEntitlement
description: Represents a commercial software license entitlement granted to a customer by an ISV through platforms such as Cryptlex, Keygen, LicenseSpring, Zentitle, Sentinel, Reprise, FlexNet, or Amazon License Manager.

entitlement_id.description: Unique identifier for the entitlement record in the issuing platform.

product.description: Name of the product the entitlement applies to.

product_version.description: Specific product version or version range the entitlement covers.

license_key.description: License key or activation token issued to the customer (often hashed in API responses).

customer.description: Customer or organization that holds the entitlement.

seats.description: Number of seats or activations included in the entitlement.

seats_consumed.description: Number of seats currently activated or in use.

valid_from.description: Timestamp at which the entitlement becomes valid (RFC 3339 date-time).

valid_until.description: Timestamp at which the entitlement expires (RFC 3339 date-time); omit for perpetual licenses.

activation.description: Activation policy and fingerprinting parameters for offline or device-bound licenses.

issuer.description: Licensing platform that issued the entitlement.
